owner_intro: Former hedge fund trader, 10yr in equities/options/futures. Trading a leveraged bull thesis on Nasdaq via TQQQ LEAP spreads. Goal: $10k -> $1M by end of 2030.
strategy_summary: Rolling 24-month bull call spreads on TQQQ with long leg at 70% of spot (30% ITM) and short leg at 125% of spot (25% OTM). One position per month funded by $500/week DCA contributions. Positions rolled when 12 months remain. No stops, no profit-taking below 2x debit. Diamond hands through drawdowns.
